problem_solved: Clinical documentation burden causes burnout for clinicians, nurses, and revenue cycle teams while reducing patient care quality
solution_description: Generative AI platform that transforms patient-clinician conversations into clinically useful, billable notes. Features Abridge Contextual Reasoning Engine for enterprise-grade AI. Integrated directly inside Epic (Haiku to Hyperdrive). Multi-specialty, multilingual support

Built by practicing MDs, AI scientists, PhDs
notes: Top-tier US player with Best in KLAS recognition. Strong Epic integration makes it ideal for large health systems. Clinical DNA with practicing physicians on team
